call_sites_verified: flip: after showCard() resolves in gameLoop — correct position (card choice made)
win/lose: immediately before getMultiplier() — score already computed, correct branch (>65 = win)
unlock: inside ogham_unlocked event listener alongside toast — decoupled, correct
end: before showRunSummary() at all 4 run-end paths — death_drain, death_effects, cards_limit, victory
t056_analysis.event_bus_correctness: PASS — no audio coupled, CustomEvent on window, future listeners can attach without touching game loop
edge_cases: PASS: playSound called before showRunSummary (correct order — sound fires, then summary shows)
PASS: no playSound in emergency fallback card path (neutral — no flip event on emergency)
NOTE: minigame neutral fallback score=50 triggers 'lose' sound (50 <= 65) — acceptable, consistent with score semantics

t057_analysis.touch_action_none: PASS — canvas { touch-action: none } in index.html global CSS prevents scroll interference on all canvas elements
t057_analysis.mg_runes_pointerdown: PASS — pointerdown added alongside click, removed in endGame() and cleanup()
t057_analysis.mg_traces_pointerdown: PASS — same pattern, both removeEventListener sites updated
t057_analysis.other_minigames: PASS — all 12 other minigames already use pointerdown/pointermove/pointerup (touch-native by design)
t057_analysis.onclick_type_compat: PASS — PointerEvent extends MouseEvent, TS accepts handler, confirmed 0 tsc errors
t057_analysis.double_fire_risk: LOW — on touch devices, pointerdown fires but click also fires (300ms later on some browsers). Both call onClick. For mg_runes this could cause double tile selection. Mitigation: existing lockInput flag prevents double processing within the same pointer sequence. Acceptable for current scope.

villages_batch2_analysis.thematic_coherence: HIGH — puits ancient, forge sacree, marche masque, fileuses, barde, conseil anciens, fete moissons, pierre spirale, guerisseur, poteau sculpte, druide toit, querelle clans, equinoxe korrigans, cheval blanc, femme meunier, procession minuit, tapisserie prophete, jeu enfants, marin impossible, cloche mysterieuse
